name: codex-auto-router
description: Routes Codex work to explicitly named, model-pinned GPT-5.6 Terra and Luna custom agents, with nested Luna support, Git worktree isolation, and mandatory parent review.

interface.shortDescription: Route work to model-pinned Terra and Luna agents
interface.longDescription: Mention Auto Router and describe only the outcome. The Sol or Terra parent spawns exact named custom agents so child threads do not silently inherit Sol, optionally allows Terra to use named Luna helpers at depth 2, isolates conflicting writes with Git worktrees, and reviews every result before integration.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this repository with model-pinned Terra and Luna custom agents and report evidence-backed issues.
Implement this issue with named Terra workers, isolated worktrees where needed, and parent review.
Process this large task set in named custom-agent threads and never fall back to inherited Sol agents.
